name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #7
description: Florentine Brainrot #7 is a crt goblin single-panel relic built around Raphael and Vaporwave Medici Mall. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Il Matto, used here as the witness card. Every small note sounds like someone was trying to hide the same problem. The archive files it under miracle-adjacent behaviour. Serial RAPH-7 carries codon marker CGTGCTCCTCACGCCGAACTC; Gematria marks RENTFREE at Σ 546.

attributes.value: a low-res dove dropping governance ballots
